question: Show customers and their total number of orders
ground_truth_sql: SELECT c.name, COUNT(o.order_id) AS order_count FROM customers c LEFT JOIN orders o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id GROUP BY c.customer_id, c.name ORDER BY order_count DESC;

question: Find products that have never been ordered
ground_truth_sql: SELECT p.name FROM products p LEFT JOIN order_items oi ON p.product_id = oi.product_id WHERE oi.product_id IS NULL;
notes: LEFT JOIN + IS NULL anti-join pattern

question: What is the total quantity sold for each product?
ground_truth_sql: SELECT p.name, SUM(oi.quantity) AS total_quantity FROM products p JOIN order_items oi ON p.product_id = oi.product_id GROUP BY p.product_id, p.name ORDER BY total_quantity DESC;

question: Show each product with its category name
ground_truth_sql: SELECT p.name AS product_name, c.name AS category_name, p.price FROM products p JOIN categories c ON p.category_id = c.category_id ORDER BY c.name, p.price DESC;

question: What is the average order total per customer?
ground_truth_sql: SELECT c.name, AVG(o.total_amount) AS avg_order_value FROM customers c JOIN orders o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id GROUP BY c.customer_id, c.name ORDER BY avg_order_value DESC;

question: Show the most recent order date for each customer
ground_truth_sql: SELECT c.name, MAX(o.order_date) AS last_order_date FROM customers c LEFT JOIN orders o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id GROUP BY c.customer_id, c.name ORDER BY last_order_date DESC NULLS LAST;
notes: LEFT JOIN + MAX aggregate; NULLS LAST for customers with no orders

question: Calculate total revenue generated by each product
ground_truth_sql: SELECT p.name, SUM(oi.subtotal) AS total_revenue FROM products p JOIN order_items oi ON p.product_id = oi.product_id GROUP BY p.product_id, p.name ORDER BY total_revenue DESC;

question: Show payment method totals for completed payments
ground_truth_sql: SELECT payment_method, COUNT(*) AS transaction_count, SUM(amount) AS total_amount FROM payments WHERE status = 'completed' GROUP BY payment_method ORDER BY total_amount DESC;
notes: Single-table GROUP BY with filter, still medium complexity

question: Find customers who have placed at least one completed order
ground_truth_sql: SELECT DISTINCT c.name, c.email FROM customers c JOIN orders o ON c.customer_id = o.customer_id WHERE o.status = 'completed';

question: Show average product rating per product
ground_truth_sql: SELECT p.name, AVG(r.rating) AS avg_rating, COUNT(r.review_id) AS review_count FROM products p LEFT JOIN reviews r ON p.product_id = r.product_id GROUP BY p.product_id, p.name ORDER BY avg_rating DESC NULLS LAST;
notes: LEFT JOIN to include products with no reviews
